title: My Dashboard Chart only draws data from one column of my connected board, but I want to choose data from a different column
excerpt: Hi there, Community. I’m new to Monday.com Dashboards and, at this time, I am working with data from only one Board. The problem is that the Chart is auto-populating with data from one column, but I would like to see sor…

posts.author: nigelthomson (Nigel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there, Community. I’m new to Monday.com Dashboards and, at this time, I am working with data from only one Board. The problem is that the Chart is auto-populating with data from one column, but I would like to see sort data from a different column. How would I do that?
Thanks in advance. N

posts.author: WLane (Wally Lane)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @nigelthomson ,
Hopefully this what you’re looking to achieve…

  1. Click the 3 dots on the top right of the chart
  2. Select Settings
  3. scroll down to the X axis (Screen shot)
  4. Select a different column to display

image1827×823 69.3 KB

posts.author: nigelthomson (Nigel)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks, Wally. This was helpful. Unfortunately, however, I only see 4 columns to choose from when the Board has many more components (including the one I want to graph). Thanks again though.

posts.author: WLane (Wally Lane)
posts.cookedHtml: The columns on your board will limit what you can select in the settings. I tried to find a list of what is compatible with what chart, but can’t find anything.

posts.author: nigelthomson (Nigel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for your efforts, Wally. I appreciate it. I’ll keep trying.
N
